fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies either that the entry is a summary entry, Closing Entry, or the type that was used in the calculation of the average cost of the item.

fields.name: Valuation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the valuation date associated with the average cost calculation.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item associated with the entry.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code associated with the entry.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Cost is Adjusted
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the cost is adjusted for the entry.

fields.name: Attached to Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies where the information for this entry comes from.

fields.name: Attached to Valuation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies where the information for this entry comes from.

fields.name: Level
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the entry is displayed.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that this entry is linked to.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date for the entry.

fields.name: Entry Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies which type of transaction that the entry is created from.

fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the average cost applies to.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number for the entry.

fields.name: Document Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document line that the comment applies to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity associated with the entry.

fields.name: Applied Quantity
fields.tooltip: This object supports the Microsoft Dynamics NAV infrastructure and is intended only for internal use.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Expected)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the expected cost in LCY of the quantity posting.

fields.name: Cost Amount (Actual)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the adjusted cost in LCY of the quantity posting.
